My Story

Data-driven. Creatively obsessed.

I'm a results-driven Social Media Manager from Jabalpur, MP — with 1.5+ years of hands-on experience in Meta Ads, content strategy, and brand growth. I help businesses generate qualified leads, build strong digital presence, and run campaigns that actually convert.

My work lives at the intersection of data and creativity — where every rupee spent on ads is backed by strategy, and every piece of content is engineered for the algorithm and the audience at the same time.

★ Campaign Case Study

Burger Singh ×
The Viral Playbook.

A full social media audit and viral campaign concept — "Singh Is Kinng Challenge" — engineered for maximum organic reach and UGC loop creation.

01
Problem
Strong product, low social traction and stagnant engagement.
02
Strategy
Audience-first content architecture with cultural resonance hooks.
03
Mechanism
"Singh Is Kinng" UGC Challenge — self-sustaining viral loop.
04
Results
Explosive organic reach, DMs, and brand conversation growth.
10M+
Projected Reach
300%
Engagement Lift
UGC ∞
Self-Sustaining Loop
Offerings

Services built for results.

Every service is a system, not just a deliverable.

🎯
From ₹5,000
Meta Ads & Performance

Data-driven campaigns engineered for maximum ROI. From creative strategy to real-time optimization — every ad rupee works harder.

  • Full-funnel campaign architecture
  • Creative strategy & ad production
  • A/B testing & audience segmentation
  • Weekly performance reporting
🌐
From ₹7,000
Website Development

Animated, immersive websites that convert visitors into clients. Built with Next.js, Three.js, and Framer Motion for a cinematic experience.

  • Animated landing pages (2D/3D)
  • Mobile-first responsive design
  • CMS integration & backend setup
  • SEO-ready, fast-loading & optimized
✦
From ₹4,000
Brand Strategy

Build a brand people remember and trust. From identity systems to viral content positioning that connects emotionally.

  • Brand identity & voice guidelines
  • Social media strategy & audit
  • Content calendar creation (15–30 days)
  • Viral campaign architecture
⚡
From ₹3,000
SEO & Growth

Rank higher. Grow faster. Sustainable organic traffic strategies paired with technical optimization for the Indian market.

  • On-page & technical SEO audit
  • Keyword research & content briefs
  • Local SEO (Jabalpur · MP · India)
  • Hosting setup & performance
